title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | May 19th 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Buy immediately, accumulate slowly; serious 2-year wait, don't panic on interim corrections.
recommendations.detail: Buy immediately / accumulate slowly from here; needs a serious 2-year view, don't panic when corrections come in between.

recommendations.note: Decent March results; ran 24-25 to 32 in 5 days, wait for a correction then buy a little; fully paid-up.
recommendations.detail: Decent March results, ran from 24-25 to 32 in five days. Wait for a correction (~30) then buy a little. Fully paid-up stock, don't dismiss as cheap because it's Rs 30. Worth investing.

recommendations.note: Asked alongside Vimta/Finotex for 2-3 year view; covered under accumulate answer, no negative flagged.
recommendations.detail: Asked for a 2-3 year view alongside Vimta Labs and Finotex; covered under the general accumulate answer, no separate negative raised.

recommendations.note: Weak results, rising luggage competition, near 52-wk low; needs reinvention to regain share.
recommendations.detail: Weak results, competition rising in luggage with new brands pulling share, stock near 52-week low. Difficult to regain lost market share unless it reinvents/rebrands. I would avoid it.

recommendations.note: Buy immediately, at least a 1-year view.
recommendations.detail: M&M - buy immediately, at least with a one-year view.

recommendations.note: Good last-quarter and full-year results; data-centre/new segments opening up. Add slowly on dips.
recommendations.detail: Add slowly on dips. Good last quarter and full-year results. Now caters to data centres / new segments beyond just retail and corporate; markets opening up.

recommendations.note: Hold as dark horse with stop-loss; Rs 1L cr funding + SBI package, Birla back in mgmt, but Bharti/Jio pressure.
recommendations.detail: Hold (bought at 1.50). Rs 1 lakh crore funding plan over 3 years + Rs 35,000 cr SBI-led package; Kumar Mangalam Birla back in management is positive. But Bharti/Jio competition (Jio IPO ahead) means tough times. Treat as a dark horse with a stop-loss.

recommendations.note: Short-term impact only; long term much better; near 52-wk low, negatives discounted. Hold; accumulate ~1,750.
recommendations.detail: Short-term impact on market share/product range; long term company will do much better. Already near 52-week low, most negatives discounted. Hold if owned; if buying, start accumulating close up to 1,750 (figure as spoken).

recommendations.note: Betting-policy euphoria fizzled; only for high risk-appetite investors.
recommendations.detail: Avoid. Stock shows some momentum on the government betting policy/guidelines but the initial euphoria/exuberance has fizzled. Only for those with high risk-appetite and capacity; such business-model stocks not suitable for everyone.

recommendations.note: Hold for 3 years; the safer choice vs Edelweiss.
recommendations.detail: Definitely hold (3-year view). The safer one between this and Edelweiss.

recommendations.note: Good company (Rashesh Shah a veteran) but treated on-and-off as speculative; Poonawalla safer.
recommendations.detail: Good company, no doubt; Rashesh Shah a veteran. But gets treated on-and-off as a speculative contract. Poonawalla is the safer choice.

recommendations.note: Stay invested; slight recovery path, sustains above 475; no clear rationale to switch to Kaynes.
recommendations.detail: Stay invested with Newgen. In a slight recovery path; recently went 500-plus and stays above 475 even after correcting. Doesn't understand the rationale for switching from Newgen to Kaynes.

recommendations.note: Top pick of the four 'Technologies'; at a temporary peak, buy only on corrections.
recommendations.detail: Number one choice among Nazara/Kaynes/Netweb/MTAR. Don't buy at current levels - reached a temporary peak. Buy after a correction; best on dips.

recommendations.note: Second choice; accumulate on every dip along with MTAR.
recommendations.detail: Second choice after MTAR. Accumulate nicely on every dip, along with MTAR.

recommendations.note: Decent March-quarter and full-year results; add slowly on declines around 2,500, ₹100 below, staggered.
recommendations.detail: Add slowly on declines in the 2,500 range. Decent March quarter and full-year results. Around 2,500 and Rs 100 below, in a staggered manner on dips.

recommendations.note: A bit weakish currently but hold.
recommendations.detail: Currently a bit weakish, but still hold.

recommendations.note: Fell ~50% from high; fertiliser imports tough; better only if raw-material sourcing right, else likely stays weak.
recommendations.detail: Fell by half from its high. Fertiliser imports getting tough. Would perform better only if raw-material sourcing is correct; otherwise likely stays weak. Phosphate is largely imported, processed here and sold.

recommendations.note: Doubts for a 2-3 month bet; profit more than halved; needs deeper study, don't buy just because it fell.
recommendations.detail: Has his own doubts for a 2-3 month bet. Fell 20%; profit dropped more than half (top line held). Needs deeper study whether one-off or sustained. Don't buy just because it fell; could fall further.
